chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-537 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of main case 21-02-2025 Mr. Manzoor Hussain Chohan, Advocate for applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G. ***** Mr. Ghulam Nabi Chadhar, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.1&2, taken on record. Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length does not press the instant Crl. Misc. Application and states that the applicant intends to exhaust remedy before the competent court of law by filing Crl. Direct Complaint under section 200 CrPC for redressal of his grievance. Order accordingly. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
